name: Cabbage Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can (28 oz.) cream of mushroom soup, undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook cabbage in salted water until tender. Drain.
2. Sauté onion in water or spray.
3. Add soup; mix well.
4. Add the cheese and heat until melted.
5. Stir in cabbage, salt, and pepper.
6. Pour mixture into an ungreased 2-quart baking dish.
7. Sprinkle crumbs on top of the casserole.
8. Bake uncovered at 350°F for 20-30 minutes.
The cookbook (Inn Ovations) states "A great potluck recipe"!
